questions.question: Which institution is to launch an e-learning hub for villagers under Unnat Bharat Abhiyan (UBA)?
questions.explanation: The Indian Institute of Management (IIM) Kozhikode is set to launch an e-learning hub and library as a pilot project for villagers in Mavoor.The village is one among the five villages adopted by the institution under the Unnat Bharat Abhiyan. Under the scheme, academicians are engaged in solving the local problems of the society. IIM Kozhikode is a partner institute for the UBA programme.

questions.question: Indian Sign Language Research and Training Center (ISLRTC) functions under the aegis of which Union Ministry?

options.label: B
options.text: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

options.label: C
options.text: Ministry of Women and Child Development

answer.label: B
answer.text: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

questions.explanation: Indian Sign Language Research and Training Centre (ISLRTC) functions under the Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, Divyangjan under the Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment.A Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) has been between the ISLRTC and National Council of Educational Research and Training (NCERT) to make educational materials such as NCERT Textbooks and Teachers Handbook accessible for hearing impaired children in their preferred format of sign language.

questions.question: Indian Farmers Fertilizer Cooperative Limited (IFFCO) has partnered with which organization to promote new agricultural technology?
questions.explanation: Indian Farmers Fertilizer Cooperative Limited (IFFCO) has partnered with Prasar Bharati to promote new agricultural technology and innovations.As per the agreement, DD Kisan channel will broadcast various innovative techniques adopted in agriculture and the innovations of IFFCO through 30 minutes program series.

questions.question: Who has been appointed as the new Director General of Bureau of Civil Aviation Security (BCAS)?
questions.explanation: Veteran IPS officer M A Ganapathy has been appointed as the Director General of Bureau of Civil Aviation Security (BCAS).As per to a Personnel Ministry order, the Appointments Committee of the Cabinet has approved the appointment of Ganapathy, for a tenure up to his superannuation on February 29, 2024. He is a 1986 batch IPS officer of Uttarakhand cadre.

questions.question: Which financial institution has issued guidelines for Product labelling in Mutual Funds?
questions.explanation: The Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) has announced detailed guidelines for product labelling in mutual funds.Earlier, there were five categories to measure the level of risks in mutual fund schemes. Now SEBI, which is the regulator, has introduced one more category known as ‘very high risk’. These new guidelines shall be in force with effect from January 1, 2021.

questions.question: As per the recent statement from the RBI, Finance companies cannot be set up with FDI from which country?
questions.explanation: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has recently announced that Finance companies cannot be set up with foreign direct investment (FDI) from Mauritius or other domains that do not meet the benchmarks laid down by Financial Action Task Force (FATF).This move of the Reserve Bank is expected to impact the huge annual inflows in the Non-Banking Financial Companies (NBFC) space.

questions.question: What is the estimated GDP contraction of India in this fiscal year, as per the RBI’s October MPC statement?
questions.explanation: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has announced that India’s GDP growth would contract by 9.5 per cent for this fiscal year.During its monetary policy committee meeting, the RBI has kept the repo rate and reverse repo rate unchanged. RBI also highlighted that Inflation is to touch the target of 4 per cent by the fourth quarter of 2020-21.

questions.question: Sadyr Zhaparov has been appointed as the new Prime Minister of which country?
questions.explanation: Kyrgyzstan’s Parliament has recently named Lawmaker Sadyr Zhaparov as the country’s new Prime Minister.This has strengthened the power of President Sooronbay Jeenbekov’s control as his principal opponent and ex-President Almazbek Atambayev was arrested. The country’s Election Commission earlier declared the poll results invalid.

questions.question: The Sittwe Port at Myanmar, which is being financed by India, is a part of which project?
questions.explanation: Sittwe is located at the mouth of the river Kaladan at Rakhine state of Myanmar. The port is being financed by India as a part of the Kaladan Multimodal Transport project. The project was jointly initiated by India and Myanmar for cargo transportation from Eastern India to the North Eastern India through Myanmar. Recently, India and Myanmar have agreed to operate the port by early 2021.

questions.question: The “Garba” folk dance that is seen in the news recently, is associated with which state?
questions.explanation: The “Garba” is a form of folk dance of Gujarat. It is performed during the 9-day celebration of the Navratri festival, in the worship of Goddess Shakti / Durga. Recently, the Government of Gujarat has disallowed performance of the Garba dance during this year’s Navratri festival, as a part of Covid management in the state.
